settings.heading: 10 Minutes. Zero Tools. Seriously.
settings.text: Watch our quick assembly video or follow the step-by-step guide below.

settings.heading: Give It Space
settings.text: Unbox in the room where you'll use it. The foam expands quickly and the sofa is easier to position before full expansion.

settings.heading: 24-Hour Rule
settings.text: While usable immediately, your sofa reaches peak comfort after 24-48 hours as the foam fully decompresses.

settings.heading: Keep The Box
settings.text: Store the original box for 30 days during your trial period, just in case you need a return.
